problem id: 8fbd2477
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  01010101 -> 00000010
  00111010 -> 10100100
  01001001 -> 11011010
  00110101 -> 11000010
  01000100 -> 10101000
  10011001 -> 11111011
  10010110 -> 10011101
  01100001 -> 11001010
  10010000 -> 10100001

query: 00001001
predicted answer: 01011010
